mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, delivery_order_no, delivery_type, crm_order_no, out_order_no, delivery_time, distributor_id, distributor_tenant_id, distributor_name, distributor_type, origin_system, `state`, creator_id, create_time, updator_id, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: insert into sp_delivery_order (id, tenant_id, delivery_order_no, delivery_type, crm_order_no, out_order_no, delivery_time, distributor_id, distributor_tenant_id, distributor_name, distributor_type, origin_system, `state`, creator_id, create_time, updator_id, update_time, deleted) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{crmOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{distributorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{distributorTenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{distributorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{distributorType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originSystem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=TINYINT})

insert into sp_delivery_order
id,
tenant_id,
delivery_order_no,
delivery_type,
crm_order_no,
out_order_no,
delivery_time,
distributor_id,
distributor_tenant_id,
distributor_name,
distributor_type,
origin_system,
`state`,
creator_id,
create_time,
updator_id,
update_time,
deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deliveryOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deliveryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{crmOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{outOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{distributorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{distributorTenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{distributorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{distributorType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{originSystem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT distributor_id, distributor_name, distributor_tenant_id, tenant_id FROM sp_delivery_order WHERE distributor_name LIKE concat('%',concat('/', #{distributorName},'%')) ESCAPE '/' and `state` in(0,1,2,4) and deleted = 0
